thread_pool_work_entry(3) Library Functions Manual thread_pool_work_entry(3)

NAME

thread_pool_work_entry - Work queue entry for task-based thread pools.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/thread_pool.h>

Data Fields


void *(* work_func )(void *)
Work function to execute. void * work_arg
Argument passed to work function. struct thread_pool_work_entry * next
Linked list next pointer.

Detailed Description

Work queue entry for task-based thread pools.

Represents a single unit of work to be executed by a pool worker.

Definition at line 87 of file thread_pool.h.

Field Documentation

struct thread_pool_work_entry* thread_pool_work_entry::next

Linked list next pointer.
